summary: Plan-only classification: #60381 remains the live canonical issue. #92005 appears to be the matching force-click implementation path for #60381, but it is already closed and unmerged, so no close, merge, or fix action is planned. #13498 is closed historical evaluate-related context only.

actions.reason: #60381 is still the best live canonical because it is the only open issue in the cluster and still tracks the remaining force-click product/implementation decision.
#92005 is relevant source-prior-art for #60381, but it is already closed and unmerged; closed refs must not receive close or merge actions.
#13498 is already-merged historical context for the evaluate part of the browser-tool family, not an open candidate to mutate.
